# YamYam Berlin

> Authentic Korean restaurant in the heart of Berlin since 2009.
> In-house developed dishes, international team, contemporary Korean cuisine.

## About
YamYam Berlin was founded in 2009 with a clear claim: authentic, well-made, no shortcuts.
We develop all dishes in-house, ferment ourselves, and combine traditional Korean ingredients with modern flavours.
The team consists of about 40 people from diverse backgrounds.

## Location
- Address: Alte Schönhauser Straße 6, 10119 Berlin-Mitte, Germany
- Phone: +49 (0)30 24 63 24 85
- Email: contact@yamyam-berlin.de
- Instagram: @yamyamberlin

## Opening Hours
- Monday–Thursday: 12:00–23:00 (Kitchen till 22:00)
- Friday–Saturday: 12:00–23:30 (Kitchen till 22:30)
- Sunday: 13:00–22:30 (Kitchen till 21:30)

## Menu
Korean food including: Lunch specials, Starters, Mains, Desserts and Drinks.
Categories: Lunch & Dailies, Soups & Starters, Mains, Desserts, Beverages.

## Reservations
Online reservations: https://app.resmio.com/yamyam-berlin/widget
Order online (delivery): https://wolt.com/en/deu/berlin/restaurant/yamyam

## Pages
- /index.html — Homepage with opening hours, location, menu teaser, about and jobs
- /menue.html — Full menu with all dishes and drinks
- /about.html — About YamYam Berlin, the team and impressions
- /jobs.html — Open positions and job descriptions
- /datenschutz.html — Impressum and privacy policy (German)
